topic: Morocco hold five-time champions Brazil to a 1-1 draw in their WC2026 Group C opener

youtube_title: Morocco Just Held Brazil 1-1 at the World Cup 😳
youtube_description: Five-time champions Brazil were held 1-1 by Morocco in their 2026 World Cup Group C opener. Ismael Saibari chipped Alisson, Vinicius Junior leveled it, and Bounou stood tall through 10 minutes of stoppage. The Atlas Lions roar again. Your daily World Cup stories, every day. #worldcup2026 #morocco #brazil
instagram_caption: The Atlas Lions held the five-time champions. Morocco 1-1 Brazil. Dark-horse run again, or does Brazil still bury this group? Call it now and I'll come find the doubters in two weeks 👇 Subscribe for your daily World Cup stories.
tiktok_caption: Morocco just held Brazil 1-1 at the World Cup. Fluke or the real deal again? Call it now and I'll come find the doubters in two weeks 👇 #worldcup2026
